_meta.purpose: per-family FX look parameters decoded from BF6 game data; consumed by the site player and the Godot map-context overlay so both previews match

assumed_fields.fps: frames/lifetime (playback rate is baked into the compiled flipbook shader; no authored fps survives in EBX)
assumed_fields.size_min/size_max/grow/rise_mps: class fallbacks only: BaseSize/SpawnSize/SizeCurve are now decoded where authored (per graph and per effect emitter); class_defaults apply to emitters without them
assumed_fields.emission: per-effect spawn bounds come from each effect's override block in manifest.json (bbox field); the graph emitter_bbox here is the template culling box

evidence.gravity: PropertyId 0xc46720e3 named via djb2-xor crack, value -9.81 in spark graphs
evidence.rotation: SpawnRot/RotationSpeed pids; +-180 spawn-rot range pids sit adjacent in the same table
evidence.six_way_smoke: LeftRightTiles atlases carry two lighting bases side by side; exported sheets are cropped to the left base (naive full-sheet playback double-tiles, which is why first-pass editor smoke looked wrong)
